lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਅਗਣਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਗਣਤੈ ॥
lines.translit: too karataa aap aganat hai sabh jag vich ganatai |
lines.english: You Yourself, O Creator, are incalculable, while the entire world is within the realm of calculation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਜੋ ਜੀਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਰਤੈ ॥
lines.translit: too karataa sabh kichh jaanadaa jo jeea andar varatai |
lines.english: You, O Creator, know everything which occurs within our beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਇਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਚਲਤੈ ॥
lines.translit: too ghatt ghatt ik varatadaa sach saahib chalatai |
lines.english: You are the One, pervading in each and every heart; O True Lord and Master, this is Your play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੀਤਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਣਤੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh keetaa teraa varatadaa sabh teree banatai |
lines.english: Everything happens according to Your Will; You created all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਕਰਿ ਰਖੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਈਐ ਚਿਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: eihu manooaa drirr kar rakheeai guramukh laaeeai chit |
lines.english: Hold this mind steady and stable; become Gurmukh and focus your consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨੋ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਪਰਤੈ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: satigur no mile su har mile naahee kisai paratai |24|
lines.english: One who meets the True Guru meets the Lord; no one can turn him away. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਬਹਦਿਆ ਉਠਦਿਆ ਨਿਤ ॥
lines.translit: kiau saas giraas visaareeai bahadiaa utthadiaa nit |
lines.english: How could you ever forget Him, with each breath and morsel of food, sitting down or standing up?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣ ਜੀਵਣ ਕੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਗਈ ਇਹੁ ਜੀਅੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਵਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: maran jeevan kee chintaa gee ihu jeearraa har prabh vas |
lines.english: My anxiety about birth and death has ended; this soul is under the control of the Lord God.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਖੁ ਤੂ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਖਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau rakh too jan naanak naam bakhas |1|
lines.english: If it pleases You, then save servant Nanak, and bless him with Your Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਬੁਲਾਈਐ ਮਹਲਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਸੀਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa bulaaeeai mehal na aavai kiau kar daragah seejhai |
lines.english: He is always invited, but he does not go to the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. How shall he be accepted in the Court of the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਆਗੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਪੀਛੈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh ahankaaree mehal na jaanai khin aagai khin peechhai |
lines.english: The egotistical, self-willed manmukh does not know the Mansion of the Lord's Presence; one moment he is here, and the next moment he is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਏ ਬਹੋੜਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aapanee kripaa kare har meraa naanak le bahorr |2|
lines.english: If my Lord grants His Grace, O Nanak, He restores them to Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa mehal viralaa jaanai sadaa rahai kar jorr |
lines.english: How rare are those who know the Mansion of the True Guru; they stand with their palms pressed together.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਤਾ ਪਾਪ ਕਸੰਮਲ ਭੰਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa satigur kaa man maniaa taa paap kasamal bhane |
lines.english: When the Mind of the True Guru is pleased, then sins and misdeeds run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਸੇਵਾ ਕੀਤੀ ਸਫਲ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਮੰਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: saa sevaa keetee safal hai jit satigur kaa man mane |
lines.english: Fruitful and rewarding is that service, which is pleasing to the Guru's Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਚੜੀ ਚਵਗਣਿ ਵੰਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: jin satigur kaa bhaanaa maniaa tin charree chavagan vane |
lines.english: Those who surrender to the True Guru's Will are imbued with the four-fold Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਜਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਸੋ ਸੁਣਿਆ ਸਿਖੀ ਕੰਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: aupades ji ditaa satiguroo so suniaa sikhee kane |
lines.english: The Sikhs listen to the Teachings imparted by the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਚਾਲ ਨਿਰਾਲੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖੀ ਗੁਰ ਦੀਖਿਆ ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨੁ ਭਿੰਨੇ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: eih chaal niraalee guramukhee gur deekhiaa sun man bhine |25|
lines.english: This is the unique and distinct life-style of the Gurmukhs: listening to the Guru's Teachings, their minds blossom forth. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੋਪਿਆ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin gur gopiaa aapanaa tis tthaur na tthaau |
lines.english: Those who do not affirm their Guru shall have no home or place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤੁ ਪਲਤੁ ਦੋਵੈ ਗਏ ਦਰਗਹ ਨਾਹੀ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat dovai ge daragah naahee thaau |
lines.english: They lose both this world and the next; they have no place in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਹਥਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਗਹਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: oeh velaa hath na aavee fir satigur lageh paae |
lines.english: This opportunity to bow at the Feet of the True Guru shall never come again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਗਣਤੈ ਘੁਸੀਐ ਦੁਖੇ ਦੁਖਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee ganatai ghuseeai dukhe dukh vihaae |
lines.english: If they miss out on being counted by the True Guru, they shall pass their lives in pain and misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh niravair hai aape le jis laae |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, has no hatred or vengeance; He unites with Himself those with whom He is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਵੇਖਾਲਿਓਨੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਦਰਗਹ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak darasan jinaa vekhaalion tinaa daragah le chhaddaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who behold the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, are emancipated in the Court of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਜੂਐ ਮਤਿ ਹਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: antar krodh jooai mat haaree |
lines.english: He is filled with anger within, and he loses his mind in the gamble.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh agiaan duramat ahankaaree |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is ignorant, evil-minded and egotistical.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਨਾ ਬੋਲਾ ਖੁਇ ਉਝੜਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anaa bolaa khue ujharr paae |
lines.english: He is blind and deaf; he loses his way, and wanders lost in the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਓਹੁ ਸੁਣੈ ਕਿਆ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa ohu sunai kiaa aakh sunaavai |
lines.english: What can he hear, and what can he tell others?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕੁਸਤੁ ਓਹੁ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kusat ohu paap kamaavai |
lines.english: He commits the sins of fraud and unrighteousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅੰਧਾ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhaa aavai jaae |
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukh comes and goes in reincarnation;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak poorab likhiaa kamaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, he acts according to his pre-ordained destiny. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette thaae na paae |
lines.english: without meeting the True Guru, he finds no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਾ ਚਿਤ ਉਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: othai sach varatadaa koorriaaraa chit udaas |
lines.english: Truth prevails there; the false ones do not attune their consciousness to it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੇ ਚਿਤ ਕਠੋਰ ਹਹਿ ਸੇ ਬਹਹਿ ਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin ke chit katthor heh se baheh na satigur paas |
lines.english: Those who have hearts as hard as stone, do not sit near the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਵਲੁ ਛਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਝਤਿ ਕਢਦੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਬਹਹਿ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਾ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: oe val chhal kar jhat kadtade fir jaae baheh koorriaaraa paas |
lines.english: By hook or by crook, they pass their time, and then they go back to sit with the false ones again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਸਚੇ ਕੂੜੁ ਨ ਗਡਈ ਮਨਿ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਕੋ ਨਿਰਜਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: vich sache koorr na gaddee man vekhahu ko nirajaas |
lines.english: Falsehood does not mix with the Truth; O people, check it out and see.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਕੂੜਿਆਰੀ ਜਾਇ ਰਲੇ ਸਚਿਆਰ ਸਿਖ ਬੈਠੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: koorriaar koorriaaree jaae rale sachiaar sikh baitthe satigur paas |26|
lines.english: The false go and mingle with the false, while the truthful Sikhs sit by the side of the True Guru. ||26||
